title: Bunch 25-shuunen Kinen Special PV: Gokushufudou

alternative_titles.en: Bunch 25th Anniversary Commemorative Special PV: The Way of the Househusband
alternative_titles.ja: バンチ２５周年記念スペシャルPV『極主夫道』

synopsis:
Animated PV to celebrate the release of volume 17 of Gokushufudou manga and 25th anniversary of Bunch magazine.

This PV features scenes from Tatsu's past that weren't depicted in the original work, brought to life in animation.

(Source: X)
